sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The player is still at rows 14-18, cols 14-18. RIGHT didn't move the player. This makes sense because the player is in vertical mode (after SPACE), and RIGHT is a horizontal movement.
Wait, but earlier the player moved RIGHT in horizontal mode. After SPACE, the player is in vertical mode, so RIGHT doesn't work.
Let me re-examine the mechanic:
- In horizontal mode: LEFT/RIGHT moves the player between chambers in the same row.
- In vertical mode: UP/DOWN moves the player between chambers in different rows.
- SPACE toggles between horizontal and vertical modes, and resets the player to the starting position.
But wait, after SPACE + DOWN, the player is at rows 14-18, cols 14-18. The player is in vertical mode. RIGHT doesn't work in vertical mode.
So the player needs to press SPACE to toggle back to horizontal mode, then RIGHT to move to the next chamber.
But SPACE resets the player to the starting position (rows 8-12, cols 14-18). So if the player presses SPACE, the player will be back at the top.
Hmm, this is a problem. The player can't move RIGHT from the current position (rows 14-18, cols 14-18) because the player is in vertical mode. And pressing SPACE resets the player to the starting position.
Let me re-examine the mechanic. Maybe SPACE doesn't reset the player to the starting position. Let me check the history more carefully.
Actually, looking at the sequence:
1. Initial: Player at rows 8-12, cols 14-18 (horizontal mode)
2. RIGHT: Player moved to rows 8-12, cols 20-24
3. LEFT: Player moved back to rows 8-12, cols 14-18
4. SPACE: Toggled to vertical mode. Player still at rows 8-12, cols 14-18.
5. DOWN: Player moved to rows 14-18, cols 14-18
6. SPACE: Toggled to horizontal mode. Player reset to rows 8-12, cols 14-18.
7. RIGHT: Player moved to rows 8-12, cols 20-24
8. SPACE: Toggled to vertical mode. Player reset to rows 8-12, cols 14-18.
9. DOWN: Player moved to rows 14-18, cols 14-18
10. RIGHT: No movement (player in vertical mode)
So SPACE always resets the player to the starting position. This means the player can only move from the starting position.
But wait, after step 5 (DOWN), the player is at rows 14-18, cols 14-18. The player is in vertical mode. Can the player move UP or DOWN from this position?
Let me try DOWN to see if the player can move further down.
Actually, looking at the ASCII:
- Row 19: WWWBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBWWWWWWWBRBWWWWWWWW
  - cols 14-18: BBBBB (wall)
There's a wall below the player. So the player can't move DOWN.
Let me try UP to see if the player can move back up.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the mechanic. After SPACE, the player is in vertical mode. In vertical mode, the player can move UP/DOWN. But the player is at rows 14-18, cols 14-18. Below is a wall, and above is the chamber at rows 8-12, cols 14-18 (which is now gray).
Let me try UP to see if the player can move back up.
